glosses.ja: 巨大な; とても大きい

sentences.target: Das Sofa ist riesig und super bequem.
sentences.reading: /das ˈzoːfa ɪst ˈʁiːzɪç ʊnt ˈzuːpɐ bəˈkveːm/

translations.de: Das Sofa ist riesig und super bequem.
translations.ipa: /das ˈzoːfa ɪst ˈʁiːzɪç ʊnt ˈzuːpɐ bəˈkveːm/
translations.en: The sofa is huge and super comfy.
translations.es: El sofá es enorme y súper cómodo.
translations.fr: Le canapé est énorme et super confortable.
translations.it: Il divano è enorme e super comodo.
translations.pt: O sofá é enorme e super confortável.
translations.vi: Chiếc sofa rất to và cực kỳ êm.
translations.nl: De bank is enorm en supercomfortabel.
translations.hu: A kanapé hatalmas és nagyon kényelmes.
translations.hi: सोफ़ा बहुत बड़ा और बहुत आरामदायक है.
translations.pl: Sofa jest ogromna i bardzo wygodna.
translations.el: Ο καναπές είναι τεράστιος και πολύ άνετος.
translations.nb: Sofaen er kjempestor og veldig komfortabel.
translations.id: Sofanya besar banget dan super nyaman.
translations.ro: Canapeaua este uriașă și foarte confortabilă.
translations.cs: Pohovka je obrovská a velmi pohodlná.
translations.da: Sofaen er kæmpestor og virkelig behagelig.
translations.fi: Sohva on tosi iso ja tosi mukava.
translations.ja: このソファ、めちゃくちゃ大きくてすごく座り心地がいい。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative neuter singular; determiner for the subject noun.
Common noun, subject of the sentence.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking the subject with the predicate adjectives.
Predicative adjective serving as a subject complement.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicate complements.
Degree adverb intensifying the following adjective.
Predicative adjective; second part of the coordinated subject complement.

translations.fr: Le gâteau a trop gonflé, il est énorme.
translations.vi: Cái bánh ra lò to quá.
translations.ja: ケーキがすごく大きくできτα。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular; determiner for the subject noun.
Common noun, subject of the clause.
Auxiliary (3rd person singular present) forming the present perfect with the participle 'geworden'.
Predicative adjective expressing the resulting state.
Past participle of 'werden' serving as the main verb in a perfect construction ('has become').

sentences.target: Die Schlange vor der Kasse ist riesig.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈʃlaŋə foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ ˈkasə ɪst ˈʁiːzɪç/

translations.de: Die Schlange vor der Kasse ist riesig.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈʃlaŋə foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ ˈkasə ɪst ˈʁiːzɪç/
translations.en: The line at the register is huge.
translations.es: La fila en la caja es larguísima.
translations.fr: La queue à la caisse est très longue.
translations.it: La fila alla cassa è lunghissima.
translations.zh-Hans: 收银台前的队伍特别长。
translations.pt: A fila no caixa está enorme.
translations.vi: Hàng đợi ở quầy thu ngân dài lắm.
translations.nl: De rij bij de kassa is heel lang.
translations.hu: A sor a pénztárnál nagyon hosszú.
translations.hi: काउंटर पर लाइन बहुत लंबी है.
translations.pl: Kolejka przy kasie jest bardzo długa.
translations.el: Η ουρά στο ταμείο είναι πολύ μεγάλη.
translations.ro: Coada la casă este foarte lungă.
translations.cs: Fronta u pokladny je strašně dlouhá.
translations.da: Køen ved kassen er virkelig lang.
translations.ja: レジの列がすごく長い。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative feminine singular; determiner for the subject noun.
Common noun; here meaning 'queue', functioning as subject.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a prepositional phrase.
Definite article in dative feminine singular agreeing with 'Kasse'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'vor'.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject with the predicate adjective.
Predicative adjective describing the subject.

sentences.target: Mein Rucksack wirkt riesig neben deinem.

translations.de: Mein Rucksack wirkt riesig neben deinem.
translations.en: My backpack seems huge next to yours.
translations.es: Mi mochila se ve enorme al lado de la tuya.
translations.fr: Mon sac à dos a l'air énorme à côté du tien.
translations.it: Il mio zaino sembra enorme vicino al tuo.
translations.ko: 내 배낭이 네 것 옆에 있으니 엄청 커 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的背包放在你旁边显得特别大。
translations.yue: 我個背囊擺喺你嗰個隔離顯得好大。
translations.ru: Мой рюкзак кажется огромным рядом с твоим.
translations.pt: Minha mochila parece enorme ao lado da sua.
translations.he: תיק הגב שלי נראה ענק ליד שלך.
translations.tr: Benim sırt çantam, seninkinin yanında kocaman görünüyor.
translations.vi: Ba lô của tôi trông rất to khi đặt cạnh của bạn.
translations.ar: حقيبة ظهري تبدو ضخمة بجانب حقيبتك.
translations.nl: Mijn rugzak lijkt enorm naast die van jou.
translations.uk: Мій рюкзак здається величезним поруч із твоїм.
translations.hu: A hátizsákom hatalmasnak tűnik a tiéd mellett.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे बैग के बगल में मेरा बैकपैक बहुत बड़ा लगता है.
translations.pl: Mój plecak wydaje się ogromny przy twoim.
translations.el: Το σακίδιό μου φαίνεται τεράστιο δίπλα στο δικό σου.
translations.nb: Ryggsekken min ser kjempestor ut ved siden av din.
translations.id: Ranselku kelihatan gede banget di sebelah tasmu.
translations.sv: Min ryggsäck ser jättestor ut bredvid din.
translations.ro: Rucsacul meu pare uriaș lângă al tău.
translations.cs: Můj batoh vedle tvého vypadá obrovně.
translations.da: Min rygsæk ser kæmpestor ud ved siden af din.
translations.fi: Reppuni näyttää tosi isolta reppusi vieressä.
translations.ja: あなたのと並ぶと、私のリュックがすごく大きく見える。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with a masculine nominative singular noun.
Common noun, subject of the sentence.
Main verb (3rd person singular present) meaning 'to appear/seem' with a predicative complement.
Predicative adjective complement after 'wirkt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a comparison location.
Possessive pronoun in dative masculine singular; stands for an elided noun (e.g., 'Rucksack').
